positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial mandalas pattern featuring intertwining crescent moons, stylized constellations, cosmic nebulae swirls, and delicate geometric sacred geometry patterns. The composition must be centrally focused and highly scalable for apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern geometric illustration. Color Palette: Deep indigo and midnight blue base, contrasted with vibrant pops of gold leaf texture, luminous lavender, and shimmering teal accents. Lighting: Magical, ethereal, glow-in-the-dark effect. Output details must maintain sharp edges and crisp vector-like quality, ensuring high print contrast and clean negative space for commercial use.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, low detail, text, signature, watermark, copyright, logo, trademark, messy, muddy colors, poor anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, cropped, sketch, photo, grayscale
